diagnostics.chalkiness_assessment: Very chalky: all 4/4 predicted Final Four teams were 1- or 2-seeds. The bracket leaned heavily on chalk.
diagnostics.upset_assessment: Reasonable upset volume: 11 upsets predicted (historical mean ~15.5, range 9–21). Conservative brackets (~11–12) tend to outscore balanced ones because wrong upset picks are doubly costly in bracket scoring.
diagnostics.sweet_16_double_digit_review: Predicted DD seed: T1444 (seed 11) (forced by structure constraint). This team did NOT reach the actual Sweet 16 in 1998.
diagnostics.champion_review: Champion incorrect: predicted T1163 (seed 2), actual champion was T1246. A seed-2 champion is uncommon but within the historical range.
